verdict.read: Hopf pointwise pullback confirms structural prediction: fiber loops yield constant pullback (density-stationary), base loops yield varying Bloch trajectory (density-traversing). Product-state I(A:B) and I_c are identically zero as expected — the pointwise product pullback is honest but trivial, confirming that a nontrivial bridge construction (not just the product state) is required for Axis 0.
